cit.basis: Standard 30% CIT under the Income Tax Act 2004 (as amended), administered by the Tanzania Revenue Authority (TRA).
cit.note: 25% applies for 3 years to companies newly listed on the Dar es Salaam Stock Exchange with at least 30% of shares issued to the public; 20% to new manufacturers of pharmaceuticals or leather products under a performance agreement; 10% to new assemblers of vehicles, tractors and fishing boats for the first 5 years.

alternative_minimum_tax.note: 0.5% alternative minimum tax on turnover for companies with perpetual unrelieved losses for three consecutive years; out of scope for this SME estimator.

vat.note: 18% standard VAT on Mainland Tanzania; Zanzibar applies a 15% standard rate under its own VAT administration.

effective_date_range.basis: Target ruleset/params year; jurisdiction fiscal calendars and transitional periods may differ.

rate_threshold_assumptions: Rates and thresholds are simplified for LedgerField estimates.
Reduced-rate eligibility windows (3-year DSE listing, 5-year assembler), performance agreements, AMT, WHT and sector-specific rules may alter outcomes.
Verify against official guidance and local advisor before filing or production use.
limitations: Not legal, tax, accounting, or filing advice.
Does not encode every deduction, exemption, treaty, WHT, payroll, or filing rule.
High-stakes use requires local validation against official forms and current law.
